query: Use $numados-explain to make these PR changes understandable on the first read.
Use $numados-explain: this implementation flow still does not make sense to me.
$numados-explain give me a concise structured explanation of what changed and why.
Use $numados-explain to break down this review finding and its actual failure path.
$numados-explain walk me through this architecture without unnecessary background.
Use $numados-explain on this error and tell me what it means in practice.
$numados-explain I do not understand optimistic concurrency; use one concrete example.
Use $numados-explain to turn this technical document into a first-read explanation.
$numados-explain compare these approaches and explain the decision briefly.
Объясни через $numados-explain, что произошло в этих изменениях и почему.
Review this pull request and find bugs.
Implement the change described in this architecture document.
Validate whether this review finding is a false alarm.
Generate a commit message for these changes.
Search the repository for all handlers.
Fix the error shown in this stack trace.
Write comprehensive user documentation for this product.
Summarize this text in one sentence.
Create a diagram of this system.
Translate this explanation into Russian.
Explain this implementation flow clearly; I did not invoke the specialized skill.
